description: Verified dependency checksums for Arkfile project

linux-amd64.notes: SeaweedFS provides official MD5 checksums for each release on GitHub

verification_notes.seaweedfs: SeaweedFS provides MD5 checksums for each GitHub release. The setup script verifies the checksum on every install.
verification_notes.rqlite: rqlite is built from source (see scripts/setup/06-setup-rqlite-build.sh) and does not use pre-built binaries.
verification_notes.security_policy: All hashes in this file have been manually verified. Do not trust this file if it has been modified outside of version control.
